profileDesc: Update your personal information and settings here.
passwordDesc: In this section, you can update your password.
othersDesc: General settings related to Sharkord's behavior.
autoJoinLastChannelDesc: Automatically rejoin the last text channel on connect.
languageDesc: Set the display language for the interface.
notificationsDesc: Control when browser notifications are sent.
notificationPermission_denied: Notifications are blocked. Please allow them in your browser settings.
notificationPermission_default: Notifications permission has not been granted yet.
allMessagesDesc: Send a notification for every new message.
mentionsOnlyDesc: Send a notification only when mentioned. Ignored if 'All Messages' is enabled.
dmNotificationsDesc: Send a notification for every new direct message.
repliesNotificationsDesc: Send a notification when someone replies to your message. Ignored if 'All Messages' is enabled.
devicesDesc: Manage your peripheral devices and their settings.
voiceChannelActiveInfo: You are in a voice channel, changes will only take effect after you leave and rejoin the channel.
noiseSuppressionInfoDescription: Approximate trade-offs for each mode. Actual CPU, memory use and voice quality depend on your browser, device and microphone.
noiseSuppressionStandardVoiceQuality: Good, usually the most natural sounding
noiseSuppressionStandardNotes: Most compatible option and the safest default.
noiseSuppressionRnnoiseVoiceQuality: Cleaner in noisy rooms, but can sound more processed
noiseSuppressionRnnoiseNotes: Experimental. Useful when Standard does not remove enough background noise.
noiseSuppressionDtlnVoiceQuality: Strong suppression, but more likely to affect tone or add artifacts
noiseSuppressionDtlnNotes: Experimental and the heaviest option. Best suited for testing on faster hardware.
noiseSuppressionExperimentalWarning: RNNoise and DTLN are experimental and might not fully work on every browser, device, or microphone setup.
noiseGateUnavailable: Noise gate is unavailable. Microphone audio will be sent without gating.
mutedDuringTest: You are temporarily muted and deafened while the test is running.
voiceControlsUnavailable: Voice controls are unavailable right now.
simulcastUserDesc: Send separate low, medium, and high-quality layers for your webcam and screen share. This uses more bandwidth and CPU, but helps viewers on slower connections receive a smoother stream. Forces the use of VP8 when enabled.
simulcastDisabledByServerDesc: Simulcast is disabled on this server.
restrictOwnAudioDesc: Exclude Sharkord audio from the audio captured during screen sharing.
restrictOwnAudioUnsupported: Your browser does not support restricting your own audio during screen sharing. Sharkord audio may be captured in the shared stream, which can cause echo or feedback.
suppressLocalAudioPlaybackDesc: When sharing audio from a tab or application, prevent it from also playing through your own playback device.
suppressLocalAudioPlaybackUnsupported: Your browser does not support suppressing local audio playback during screen sharing. The shared audio will continue to play through your speakers as well as through the voice channel.
screenSharingNote: These screen sharing settings are best effort and may not be supported on all platforms or browsers, which means that in some cases the actual resolution, framerate or codec used may differ from the selected ones. In the end, is up to the browser to handle the screen sharing stream in the best way possible, based on the current system performance and network conditions.
onlyAskForPasswordOnFirstJoinLabel: Only Ask For Password On First Join
onlyAskForPasswordOnFirstJoinDesc: When enabled, users only need to enter the server password the first time they join.
allowNewUsersDesc: Allow anyone to register and join your server. If disabled, only users you invite can join.
pluginsDesc: Enable or disable plugins for your server.
simulcastDesc: Allow users to send multiple video quality layers so receivers can adapt to weaker connections. This will increase bandwidth and CPU usage in the server, but can improve the experience for users on slower connections.
directMessagesEnabledDesc: Allow users to send direct messages to each other. If disabled, users can only communicate in channels.
searchEnabledDesc: Allow users to search for messages and files across the server.
showWelcomeDialogDesc: Show a profile setup dialog to users the first time they join the server.
usersDesc: Manage server users and their permissions
searchUsersPlaceholder: Search users by name or identity...
selectRoleToEdit: Select a role to edit or create a new one
defaultRoleInfo: This is the default role. New members will be assigned this role upon joining.
ownerRoleInfo: This is the owner role. This role has all permissions and cannot be deleted or have its permissions changed.
roleStorageOverrideDesc: Use this role's quota instead of the global quota per user. Users with multiple override roles get the highest quota.
deleteRoleMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this role? If there are members with this role, they will be moved to the default role. This action cannot be undone.
setDefaultRoleMsg: Are you sure you want to set this role as the default role? New members will be assigned this role upon joining.
invitesDesc: Manage invitation links for users to join the server
searchInvitesPlaceholder: Search invites by code or creator...
noPluginsDesc: Install plugins to add new features and extend the functionality of your Sharkord server.
pluginsDisabledDesc: Plugins have been disabled for this server. Enable plugins in the server settings to manage and use plugins.
removePluginConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? This will remove the plugin folder and whatever data is stored in it, so make sure to backup any important data before proceeding. This action cannot be undone.
marketplaceDesc: Browse and discover plugins from the community to extend your server.
marketplaceFetchError: Failed to load the plugin marketplace
marketplaceSearchPlaceholder: Search plugins by name, author, or tag...
marketplaceVerifiedTooltip: This plugin was verified by Sharkord.
marketplaceInstallSuccess: "{{name}}" was installed successfully. You need to enable it manually to start using it.
storageDesc: Manage your server's storage settings. Control how data is stored, accessed, and managed. Here you can configure storage limits, backup options, and data retention policies to ensure optimal performance and reliability.
allowUploadsDesc: Allows users to upload files to the server. Existing files won't be affected.
allowFileSharingInDMsLabel: Allow file sharing in direct messages
allowFileSharingInDMsDesc: Allows users to share files in direct messages. This setting only applies if uploads are enabled, and it does not affect existing files in direct messages.
quotaDesc: The total amount of storage space allocated to the server.
quotaHelp: This is not a hard limit, meaning that files will still be written to disk temporarily even if the quota is exceeded. The overflow action will be applied after the upload is complete. Make sure you have more disk space available than the quota you set here.
maxFileSizeDesc: The maximum size of a single file that can be uploaded to the server.
maxAvatarSizeDesc: The maximum avatar file size users are allowed to set on their profile.
maxBannerSizeDesc: The maximum profile banner file size users are allowed to set.
quotaPerUserDesc: The maximum amount of storage space each user can use on the server. You can also configure quotas on a per-role basis in the Roles settings, which will override this global setting for users with that specific role. Use 0 for unlimited
maxFilesPerMessageDesc: Maximum number of attachments allowed on a single message. Extra files are ignored.
overflowActionDesc: Action to take when the global storage quota is exceeded.
updatesDesc: Check for and install updates to keep your Sharkord server running with the latest features and security improvements.
updatesNotSupportedDesc: Automatic updates are not supported in this environment. Please refer to the documentation for manual update instructions.
updateAvailableDesc: A new version ({{version}}) is available for download. Updating will restart the server and may cause temporary downtime.
upToDateDesc: Your server is running the latest version of Sharkord.
privateDesc: Restricts access to this channel to specific roles and members.
permissionsDesc: Manage channel-specific permissions for roles and users. These permissions are not inherited from server-level permissions. User permissions take precedence over role permissions.
publicChannelDesc: This is a public channel; everyone has access by default. These permissions will not be applied unless the channel is set to private. You can do this in the General Settings tab.
selectRoleOrUser: Select a role or user to edit permissions, or add a new override
emojiNamePlaceholder: Enter emoji name (no spaces or special characters)
emojiNameHint: This will be used as :{{name}}: in messages
deleteEmojiMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this emoji? This action cannot be undone.
uploadEmojiDesc: Select an emoji to edit or upload new ones to customize your server
imageOptimizationDesc: Converts supported image uploads to optimized WebP files.
imageQualityDesc: Controls the WebP quality used for optimized images. Higher values preserve detail but use more storage.
signedUrlsDesc: When enabled, all file URLs require a signed token with an expiration time. This prevents unauthorized access to files by URL guessing. When disabled, files in public channels are accessible by anyone with the URL.
signedUrlsTtlDesc: How long a signed URL remains valid before it expires. Shorter durations enhance security but may cause inconvenience for users accessing files.
deleteInviteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this invite? This action cannot be undone.
removeRoleMsg: Are you sure you want to remove the role "{{roleName}}" from this user?
kickMsg: Please provide a reason for kicking this user (optional).
banMsg: Please provide a reason for banning this user (optional).
cannotBanDeletedUser: Cannot ban or unban the deleted user placeholder
unbanMsg: Are you sure you want to unban this user?
deleteFileMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
